title: Memento
text: Memento is a 2000 American neo-noir psychological thriller film written and directed by Christopher Nolan, based on the short story 'Memento Mori' by his brother Jonathan Nolan. The film follows Leonard Shelby, a man suffering from anterograde amnesia who uses tattoos, Polaroid photographs, and handwritten notes to investigate his wife's death.

title: Inception
text: Inception is a 2010 science fiction action film written and directed by Christopher Nolan. It stars Leonardo DiCaprio as a professional thief who steals information by infiltrating the subconscious of his targets through their dreams. The film also stars Ken Watanabe, Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Marion Cotillard, Elliot Page, Tom Hardy, Cillian Murphy, Tom Berenger, and Michael Caine.

title: Interstellar
text: Interstellar is a 2014 epic science fiction film co-written, directed, and produced by Christopher Nolan. It stars Matthew McConaughey, Anne Hathaway, Jessica Chastain, Bill Irwin, Ellen Burstyn, Matt Damon, and Michael Caine. Set in a dystopian future where humanity is struggling to survive, the film follows a group of astronauts who travel through a wormhole near Saturn in search of a new home for mankind.
